docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, KHUONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PHAM, DANG AKA DANG THI NGUYEN DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $0.00. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TRAN, KHUONG AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, DANG AKA DANG THI NGUYEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF CORRECT NAME OF DEFENDANT DANG THI NGUYEN FILED BY DEFENDANT PHAM, DANG AKA DANG THI NGUYEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. PLAINTIFF KHUONG TRAN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS LISA NGUYEN. DEFENDANT DANG PHAM AKA DANG THI NGUYEN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS CHUNG TI KIM PHAM . PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVED) SERVED JUL-17-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, DANG AKA DANG THI NGUYEN
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY TRAN, KHUONG PHAM, DANG AKA DANG THI NGUYEN

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KHUONG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2023 - JUDGMENT.
